song.title: Welcome Cross
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) ’Tis my happiness below Not to live without the cross; But the Savior’s pow’r to know, Sanctifying every loss.
[V2] 2) Trials must and will befall; But with humble faith to see Love inscribed upon them all— This is happiness to me.
[V3] 3) Did I meet no trials here, No chastisement by the way, Might I not, with reason, fear I should prove a castaway?
[V4] 4) Trials make the promise sweet; Trials give new life to prayer; Bring me to my Savior’s feet, Lay me low and keep me there
song.author: William Cowper
